name: Broccoli Soup# 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven or soup kettle, bring water to a boil.
2. Add broccoli, celery, and carrots; boil for 2-3 minutes. Drain and set vegetables aside.
3. In the same kettle, sauté onion in butter until tender.
4. Stir in flour to form a smooth paste.
5. Gradually add the broth and milk, stirring constantly.
6. Bring to a boil and continue boiling and stirring for 1 minute.
7. Add vegetables and remaining ingredients.
8. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 30-40 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Yield: 6-8 servings (2 quarts)
